prompt: A narrow, dimly lit corridor stretches into the distance, its concrete floor cracked and stained with patches of moss and dirt. The walls, once smooth, are now heavily weathered, with large sections of paint peeling away to reveal the rough texture beneath. Rusted metal railings line both sides of the walkway, their surfaces corroded and bent. At the far end, a set of stairs ascends into shadow, illuminated only by the faint glow of a distant sign. A single, old arcade machine stands abandoned near the left railing, its screen dark and its casing covered in grime. The ceiling is low, with a few fluorescent lights casting a cold, pale glow that barely penetrates the gloom. The air feels still and heavy, as if time has long since stopped moving here.The camera moves forward, slowly approaching the arcade machine. As it nears, the view shifts slightly to the right, revealing more of the corridor’s length. A red "EXIT" sign glows faintly in the distance, hanging above the stairs. The railings continue down the hall, their rusted forms growing more defined as the camera advances. The arcade machine remains a central focus, its details becoming clearer — the faded buttons, the cracked screen, the dust that has settled on every surface. The cracks in the floor widen as the camera moves, and the peeling paint on the walls seems to ripple with the motion. The atmosphere grows more oppressive, the silence thick with the weight of abandonment.
